## Strategic decision impact

What product judgment becomes more reliable because of this change?

## UX3 mapping

- [ ] User Flow
- [ ] Evidence Flow
- [ ] Business Flow
- [ ] Human Judgment Gate
- [ ] UX3 Decision Kernel

## Evidence and counter-signal

State the source, signal, interpretation, counter-signal, and observed or
expected decision impact. Link the Field Evidence issue when available.

## Human judgment boundary

What remains Designer-in-the-Loop? Name the accountable role, trade-off, and
reversal condition.

## Execution boundary

State what this change may do, must not do, and must ask before doing.

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python scripts/validate.py`
- [ ] Relevant golden review validates with `scripts/check_review.py`
- [ ] Documentation and machine contracts agree
- [ ] No unsupported outcome claims

## Privacy and consent

- [ ] No private customer or participant data is included
- [ ] Published field evidence is authorized and redacted
